detaileddescription.para: In all cases we set up the same amount of data transfer by the msgs, that is, equivalent to a fully recurrently connected network. Used in regressionTests/benchmarkTests.cpp

codeline.highlight: ret=SetGet3< unsigned int, unsigned int, unsigned int >::set(
